2605.00410.title: Agent Capsules: Quality-Gated Granularity Control for Multi-Agent LLM Pipelines
2605.00410.paper_summary: A multi-agent pipeline with N agents typically issues N LLM calls per run. Merging agents into fewer calls (compound execution) promises token savings, but naively merged calls silently degrade quality through tool loss and prompt compression. We present Agent Capsules, an adaptive execution runtime that treats multi-agent pipeline execution as an optimization problem with empirical quality constraints. The runtime instruments coordination overhead per group, scores composition opportunity, selects among three compound execution strategies, and gates every mode switch on rolling-mean output quality. A controlled negative result confirms that injecting more context into a merged call worsens compression rather than relieving it, so the framework's escalation ladder (standard, then two-phase, then sequential) recovers quality by moving toward per-agent dispatch rather than by rewriting merged prompts. On LLM-judged quality, the controller matches a hand-tuned oracle on every measured (model, group, mode) cell: routing compound whenever the oracle would, and reverting to fine whenever quality would fail the floor, without per-model configuration. Against a hand-crafted LangGraph implementation of a 14-agent competitive intelligence pipeline, Agent Capsules uses 51% fewer fine-mode input tokens and 42% fewer compound-mode input tokens, at +0.020 and +0.017 quality respectively. Against a DSPy implementation of a 5-agent due diligence pipeline, the framework uses 19% fewer tokens than uncompiled DSPy at quality parity, and 68% fewer tokens than MIPROv2 at +0.052 quality. Even before compound mode fires, the runtime delivers efficiency through automatic policy resolution, cache-aligned prompts, and topology-aware context injection, matching both hand-tuned and compile-time baselines without training data or per-pipeline engineering.
2605.00410.paper_summary_zh: 一個具有 N 個代理的多代理管道通常每次運行會發出 N 次 LLM 調用。將代理合併為更少的調用（複合執行）承諾節省標記，但天真的合併調用會通過工具損失和提示壓縮無聲地降低質量。我們提出了代理膠囊，一種自適應執行運行時，將多代理管道執行視為一個具有經驗質量約束的優化問題。該運行時對每組的協調開銷進行儀器化，評分組合機會，從三種複合執行策略中選擇，並在滾動平均輸出質量上對每個模式切換進行閘控。一個受控的負面結果證實，將更多上下文注入合併調用會加劇壓縮而不是緩解，因此該框架的升級梯度（標準，然後是兩階段，然後是順序）通過朝向每個代理的調度而不是重寫合併提示來恢復質量。在 LLM 評判的質量上，控制器在每個測量的（模型，組，模式）單元中與手動調整的神諭匹配：每當神諭會路由複合時，並在質量低於底線時恢復至精細，無需每個模型的配置。與一個手工製作的 LangGraph 實現的 14 代理競爭情報管道相比，代理膠囊使用 51% 更少的精細模式輸入標記和 42% 更少的複合模式輸入標記，質量分別為 +0.020 和 +0.017。與一個 DSPy 實現的 5 代理盡職調查管道相比，該框架在質量相當的情況下使用的標記比未編譯的 DSPy 少 19%，比 MIPROv2 少 68%，質量為 +0.052。即使在複合模式啟動之前，該運行時通過自動政策解析、緩存對齊提示和拓撲感知上下文注入提供效率，匹配手動調整和編譯時基準，無需訓練數據或每個管道的工程。
2605.00410.author: Aninda Ray et.al.
